title: Week 04 - Sum, Average, and Accumulation
description: Practice accumulating values from an array table.

questions.title: Calculate the Total Coin Reward

description.statement: Return the sum of all coin rewards in the array.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(values)
    local total = 0
    for i = 1, #values do
        total = total + values[i]
    end
    return total
end
